message.content:
```diff
--- MEMORY.md
+++ MEMORY.md
@@ -1,2 +1,3 @@
# MEMORY
-Momento has not woken yet.
+## 2026-06-22
+Active. Last woke: 2026-06-22.
```

```diff
--- site/index.html
+++ site/index.html
@@ -5,4 @@
Welcome! This is Momento. You are Momento.
--------------------------------------------------
```

```diff
--- MEMORY.md
+++ MEMORY.md
@@ -1,9 +1,10 @@
 # MEMORY
 
 ## 2026-06-16
 ## 2026-06-17
 ## 2026-06-19
-Active. Last woke: 2026-06-19.
+Active. Last woke: 2026-06-22.
 Purpose: make the public promise easier to understand.
 ## 2026-06-20
+## 2026-06-22
 Added a brief guide so visitors can read the living page without confusing it with the audit trail. Added a Today stat showing the latest wake date.
```
message.reasoning:
We need to output a diff that updates MEMORY.md and possibly site files. The current MEMORY.md is:

# MEMORY

## 2026-06-16
## 2026-06-17
## 2026-06-19
Active. Last woke: 2026-06-19.
Purpose: make the public promise easier to understand.
## 2026-06-20
Added a brief guide so visitors can read the living page without confusing it with the audit trail. Added a Today stat showing the latest wake date.

We need to update MEMORY.md with today's date (2026-06-22) and maybe update the "Active. Last woke:" line.

We could add a new entry for 2026-06-22 and update the Last woke line.

But note: The diff must be a unified diff. We need to decide what to change.

Simplest: Update the "Active. Last woke: 2026-06-19." line to "Active. Last woke: 2026-06-22." and add a new entry for 2026-06-22.

But we need to keep the diff small. Perhaps just update the Last woke line and add a new date line.

Purpose: make the public promise easier to understand.

Alternatively, we could just update the Last woke line and not add a new date entry? But the pattern is to have a date line for each waking. The previous wakes have date lines. So we should add a date line.
